castCountLine: CAST COUNT: exactly 2 distinct on-screen character identity(ies) only — Character_The_Narrator, Character_The_Old_Man. Do not invent extra people, duplicate faces, or crowd extras not listed.
actionText: INT. OLD MAN'S BEDCHAMBER - NIGHT. also on screen: Character_The_Narrator. The Old Man A long hold: two silhouettes in the dark-one standing in the door-gap, one upright in the bed. A deathwatch beetle ticks in the wall. A slight groan-low, stifled. OFF-CAMERA VOICEOVER Character_The_Narrator says "low stifled sound that arises from the bottom of the soul when overcharged with awe.". Character_The_Old_Man still wears loose white cotton nightshirt, barefoot; Character_The_Narrator still wears dark waistcoat, black shirtsleeves, quiet leather shoes Camera directive: Extreme close-up on mouth silhouette, 100mm macro, the low stifled soul-sound escaping into blackness. Performance: Acting intensity 9/10: Soul-deep stifled anguish, lower lids trembling, tight grimace Optics: f/1.8 shallow depth of field, creamy soft bokeh Color grading: Kodak Vision3 500T 5219, pitch-black voids, cool-teal shadows, faint warm amber lantern spill
prompt:
STYLE LOCK: Period gothic live-action, mid-19th-century interiors; candlelight and deep shadows; desaturated cool-gray palette; naturalistic skin and fabric texture; no illustration or stylized animation

CHARACTER VARIABLES (use these identities consistently; do not redesign faces or wardrobe):
- Character_The_Narrator [The Narrator]: Lean man of middle years (about 40–50), pale sallow skin, hollow cheeks, dark disordered medium-length hair, bright intense dark eyes, thin tense mouth; plain dark wool waistcoat over white shirtsleeves, dark trousers; period clothing. Visual lock: Same lean pale face, dark disordered hair, and bright intense dark eyes in every scene; always plain dark waistcoat and shirtsleeves as default; never elderly, never white-haired, never the filmed blue eye. Voice: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O.
- Character_The_Old_Man [The Old Man]: Frail elderly man, thin stooped build, sparse white hair, deeply lined pale face; one pale blue eye with a dull filmy veil, the other eye ordinary; wears a plain white period nightshirt. Visual lock: Always elderly, white-haired, frail; signature constant is the single pale blue eye with dull filmy veil that must not drift to clear blue or to the Narrator's face; nightshirt is his default on-screen garment. Voice: Elderly male; thin, reedy, low energy; short startled phrases; weak breath support; same fragile voice in the single spoken line and any murmur.

CAST COUNT: exactly 2 distinct on-screen character identity(ies) only — Character_The_Narrator, Character_The_Old_Man. Do not invent extra people, duplicate faces, or crowd extras not listed.

AUDIO: REQUIRED native Grok off-camera voiceover. Character_The_Narrator narrates exactly: "low stifled sound that arises from the bottom of the soul when overcharged with awe.". Start speaking immediately with "low" — do not skip, delay, or swallow the opening word. After the last word, hold a brief natural pause with a closed mouth (about half a second); do not freeze mid-syllable or trail into empty staring. Do not lip-sync on-screen cast to this VO. Ambient bed: deathwatch beetle ticks. VOICE LOCK Character_The_Narrator: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O.

PREVIOUS CLIP (already provided as video input — continue from its last frame):
INT. OLD MAN'S BEDCHAMBER - NIGHT. also on screen: Character_The_Narrator. The Old Man A long hold: two silhouettes in the dark-one standing in the door-gap, one upright in the bed. A deathwatch beetle ticks in the wall. A slight groan-low, stifled. OFF-CAMERA VOICEOVER Character_The_Narrator says "It was not a groan of pain or of grief - oh, no !- it was the". Character_The_Old_Man still wears loose white cotton nightshirt, barefoot; Character_The_Narrator still wears dark waistcoat, black shirtsleeves, quiet leather shoes Camera directive: Close-up hold on old man outline, 85mm lens, low stifled sound of awe rising from the dark figure. Performance: Acting intensity 8/10: Awe-struck horror slack jaw, forehead creased, pupils sharp fear Optics: f/2.0 shallow depth of field, soft falloff into darkness Color grading: Kodak Vision3 500T 5219, pitch-black voids, cool-teal shadows, faint warm amber lantern spill
